message:
Switch from /v1/chats to /v1/chats/search for complete chat enumeration

/v1/chats silently caps results at ~25 per account, returning only 375
of 1,619 total chats. /v1/chats/search supports limit=200, proper
cursor pagination, and returns all chats. This found 1,245 iMessage
chats that were previously invisible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
